password.reason: Password field, always visible in config window (suppress raw displayLogic that depends on autosave)

isPasswordExpired.reason: Display-only flag indicating if password needs reset

locked.reason: Account lock status, typically system-managed but visible for admin review

position.reason: Job title/position, useful for user identification

defaultRole.reason: Default role at login, essential config field

defaultClient.reason: Default client on login, cascades from defaultRole

defaultOrganization.reason: Default organization for new transactions, cascades from defaultRole

defaultWarehouse.reason: Default warehouse for logistics, cascades from defaultClient

image.reason: Image/avatar field, not critical for initial version

birthday.reason: Low value for configuration window, not essential

alternativePhone.reason: Secondary phone rarely used in simplified UI

fax.reason: Fax is obsolete, not needed in simplified UI

emailServerUsername.reason: Email server config is handled in the Email Configuration subtab

emailServerPassword.reason: Email server config is handled in the Email Configuration subtab

partnerAddress.reason: Address detail rarely needed for user config, low priority

comments.reason: Already system in raw, low value for simplified UI

roleAdmin.reason: Controls whether user can administer the role

sMTPAuthentification.reason: Controls whether auth fields are relevant

testSuccessful.reason: Status flag from last SMTP test

defaultConfiguration.reason: Marks this as the default SMTP config

SL_User_Name_Lastname.description: Auto-composes full Name from First Name and Last Name when Last Name changes
SL_User_Name_Lastname.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually type the full name even after entering first/last name
SL_User_Name_Lastname.reason: Simple name concatenation, core UX improvement

SL_User_Name_Firstname.description: Auto-composes full Name from First Name and Last Name when First Name changes
SL_User_Name_Firstname.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually type the full name even after entering first/last name
SL_User_Name_Firstname.reason: Simple name concatenation, core UX improvement

SL_User_Name_Name.description: Callout triggered when Name field changes directly (reverse of above)
SL_User_Name_Name.impactIfOmitted: No impact since Name is auto-derived from first/last name
SL_User_Name_Name.reason: Reverse direction (Name -> first/last) creates circular dependency, unnecessary

EmailConfiguration_Port_Smtpconnectionse.description: Auto-sets SMTP port based on connection security selection (25/465/587)
EmailConfiguration_Port_Smtpconnectionse.impactIfOmitted: Users must know which port to use for each security type
EmailConfiguration_Port_Smtpconnectionse.reason: Simple port assignment, prevents common misconfiguration

AD_Client_Security_validation.description: Restricts client selection to user's accessible clients
AD_Client_Security_validation.impactIfOmitted: Users could see clients they don't have access to

C_BPartner_Location.description: Filters partner address by selected business partner
C_BPartner_Location.impactIfOmitted: No impact since partnerAddress field is discarded
C_BPartner_Location.reason: partnerAddress is discarded in simplified UI

AD_Role_of_User.description: Restricts default role selection to roles assigned to this user
AD_Role_of_User.impactIfOmitted: Users could select a role they don't have access to
AD_Role_of_User.reason: Data integrity constraint for role-based cascade

AD_Client_of_Role.description: Restricts default client to clients accessible via the selected default role
AD_Client_of_Role.impactIfOmitted: Users could select a client not reachable from their default role
AD_Client_of_Role.reason: Cascade validation for role -> client -> org -> warehouse

AD_Org_of_Role.description: Restricts default org to orgs accessible via the selected default role
AD_Org_of_Role.impactIfOmitted: Users could select an organization not accessible from their default role

M_Warehouse_of_Role.description: Restricts default warehouse to warehouses belonging to the selected default client
M_Warehouse_of_Role.impactIfOmitted: Users could select a warehouse from a different client

AD_Role_of_Client.description: Restricts role selection in User Roles subtab to roles of the current client
AD_Role_of_Client.impactIfOmitted: Users could assign roles from other clients

Display_Password.description: Shows password field only after record is saved (AD_USER_ID is not empty) or on autosave
Display_Password.impactIfOmitted: Password field is always visible (simpler UX for admin config)
Display_Password.reason: Suppressed via displayLogic: null in field decision, password is always visible in simplified UI

Display_EmailServerPassword.description: Shows email server password only after record is saved
Display_EmailServerPassword.impactIfOmitted: No impact since emailServerPassword field is discarded
Display_EmailServerPassword.reason: Field is discarded in simplified UI

Processing.reason: Hardcoded process, not applicable to simplified UI

Grant_Portal_Access.description: Grants portal role access and resets password for external users
Grant_Portal_Access.impactIfOmitted: Admin must manually configure portal access (rarely used feature)
Grant_Portal_Access.reason: Portal-specific feature, not needed in initial simplified version

Test_SMTP_Connection.description: Tests SMTP server connection and updates test result fields
Test_SMTP_Connection.impactIfOmitted: Admins cannot verify SMTP config before sending real emails
Test_SMTP_Connection.reason: Essential diagnostic tool for email configuration
